creator: olevole@yandex.ru
text:
Hello,

kdesu (as i know) is obsoleted for KDE4, so some program (like kports) who doing execute kdesu is not working. 

(But man page still exist for kde4:

pkg_which /usr/local/kde4/man/man1/kdesu.1.gz
[Updating the pkgdb <format:bdb_btree> in /var/db/pkg ... - 891 packages found (-0 +3) ... done]
kdebase-runtime-4.1.1
)

How-To-Repeat: Install ports-mgmt/kports on system with KDE4
in xterm:
su -m root -c 'kports'  (becouse kports oriented for root privileges)
(entering root password)
On many task kports showin "An Error ocurred trying.."
and xterm showing output:

kdesu: not found
